title: helianthemum × hispidum
intro: Helianthemum × hispidum, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum × hispidum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote the healing of burns. Helianthemum × hispidum is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and ointments, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
